packageRules.description: Group all linuxserver.io images into one PR
Majors get their own label so they stand out
Self-built images (inference-club CI -> ghcr, private): not Renovate's job — CI moves these, and anonymous lookups fail with no-result noise
jellyfin: pinned to a daily (see jellyfin.yaml); daily tags would spam PRs. Re-enable when back on stable 10.11.12+
longhorn chart: STORAGE CEREMONY — upgrades are ordered/one-way and touch the volume substrate. PRs only via explicit dashboard approval; read release notes; verify volume health before+after.

nvidia GPU plumbing (device-plugin/GFD/dcgm): version bumps have shipped breaking manifest changes (v0.19: NODE_NAME + NodeFeature-API default — see #45 saga, d4ba050). gpu/ is outside the tranche, so these need a human apply anyway — gate PRs behind dashboard approval. Also NFD (github datasource, same gpu/ dir): the 0.18 bump needed kubectl replace (SSA chokes on the exec→grpc probe switch).

customManagers.description: Bitwarden CLI pinned by URL in hermes' install-vault-tools initContainer
